common_names.format_doc: Plain UTF-8, one name per line. Lines starting with '# <lang>' switch the active language section (e.g. '# en', '# it'). Subsequent non-empty lines belong to that section. Names are lowercased.
common_names.description: Common first names for aggressive name detection — multi-language, sectioned by ISO 639-1 code. Used by BlurData's optional aggressive Name detector.
